Men's Basketball Roster Schedule Statistics Additional Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

10 Isaac White

  • Height 6-3
  • Weight 185
  • Year Freshman
  • Hometown Ontario, N.Y.
  • High School Wayne
  • Position G
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats

Biography

AS A FRESHMAN (2025-26)
Saw action in one game, scoring three points.

HIGH SCHOOL
Awarded the Section V Class A Sportsmanship Award and Coaches Award senior season. A part of a team that won the Finger Lakes East Championship and the Section V Class A Championship during junior and senior season. In 2024, was a part of a team that was a Class A Finalist and in 2025, a part of a team that made it to the Class A State Final Four. White was also a member of the soccer team for the Eagles. While on the pitch, White was awarded the Ideal Teammate Award and Soccer Alumni Scholarship recipient his senior season. The team went on to win the Finger Lakes East Championship during his junior and senior seasons. To add to White's impressive athletic resume, he was also a member of the National Honor Society.

PERSONAL
Son of Cathy and Gary... Brother to Peter and Evelyn... Mother Cathy played women's soccer at Nazareth College... Volunteers with Boy Scouts of America... Majoring in Exercise Science.
